title: Void Into Gold (Forged Above Gold Mix)

style.styleSentence: A high-energy, gritty East Coast boom-bap anthem at 96 BPM featuring stomping drums, cinematic soul strings, dusty piano stabs, and brass hits that support a raw female gospel lead with soaring belts over sharp male rap verses and rowdy call-and-response crew shouts.
style.vocalStyle: Raw Gospel Lead with Gritty Rap Verses

sections.raw: Intro - Female Spoken, Low And Serious
sections.text:
Mm.
This summer still feel different.
But this ain’t no vacation.
This is pressure.
This is fire.
This is where the void learns its name.

Build!
Rise!
Pressure make gold!
Pressure make more!

Ah ya ya
We outside now
Ah ya ya
Feet on the ground
Ah ya ya
Let the bass roll low
From the void to the gold

I had too much weight sitting heavy on my shoulders
Too many tabs in my mind, too many nights getting colder
Same walls, same clock, same fight with time
Same ghost in the room saying “you ain’t gon’ shine”
But the drums came in like a war call
Strings hit sharp, made the whole floor talk
One deep breath, then I stood up straight
Had to stop asking life when it’s my time to take
Laptop closed but the soul still loading
Hands still dirty but the heart still golden
I was down in the void with the lights gone low
Now I beat on the dark till the whole thing glow

I was not broken
I was being remade
I was not buried
I was under the flame

Empty out the fear
Fill the chest with fire
Step through the noise
Climb a little higher
No shame in the scars
No fear in the climb
If the world get loud around me
I’ma turn it into mine

We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold
Gold in the heart
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Gold!
But we aiming past gold!
Gold!
Make the whole world know!

Oh-oh, let it burn
Oh-oh, let it show
Oh-oh, watch me grow
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Mind clear
Heart bold
Hands up
Still gold
New me
Still loading
Soul clean
Still glowing

Cocktails and code used to sit on the table
Dreams in the blue screen, working when able
Now every line that I typed in pain
Came back strong with a brand-new name
No more waiting on permission
No more begging for a lane
No more hiding all the vision
No more making joy feel strange
They laughed when the tools came out
Said it ain’t real when the new wave sprout
But I built with the sparks, built with the scars
Built with the bass and I aimed at stars
You can call it slop, I call it seed
You can call it fake, I call it freed
You can throw shade, I let it mold
I came from the void and I turned it gold

I don’t need your crown
I don’t need your gate
I don’t need your doubt
I don’t need your weight

Have your joy but keep your spirit
Touch the flame but keep your name
Taste the world but don’t disappear in it
Pleasure don’t have to become pain
Pass the plate and pass forgiveness
Raise your glass and bless the air
We are only here a minute
Build the life you want while you here

We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold
Gold in the heart
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Gold!
But we aiming past gold!
Gold!
Make the whole world know!

Oh-oh, let it burn
Oh-oh, let it show
Oh-oh, watch me grow
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

sections.raw: Bridge - Spoken Female Over Snare Rolls
sections.text:
Listen.
You don’t have to answer every alarm.
You don’t have to carry every ghost.
You don’t have to stay small
just because they met you in the dark.
Some nights are for healing.
Some nights are for hands in the air.
But some nights?
Some nights you build the crown yourself.

sections.raw: Breakdown - Male Crew Call And Response
sections.text:
Who built you?
Pressure did!
Who raised you?
Lessons did!
Who doubted?
They all did!
Who shining?
We all is!

Mind go quiet
Heart go wide
Bassline rolling
Fire inside
Mind go quiet
Heart go wide
This summer different
We still alive

sections.raw: Final Verse - Male Rap, Victory Energy
sections.text:
I’m not just gold, I’m alloyed with the lesson
Every loss got melted into blessing
Every no got folded in the steel
Every scar turned proof I’m real
Gold can bend, gold can shine
But I want worth they can’t define
Higher than chains, higher than rings
Higher than price, higher than kings
From the void to the flame
From the flame to the mold
From the mold to the shine
From the shine past gold

sections.raw: Final Chorus - Full Power, Female Lead + Crew
sections.text:
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold
Gold in the heart
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Gold!
But we aiming past gold!
Gold!
Make the whole world know!

Higher than gold
Higher than fear
Higher than what they said we were
We still here

Ah ya ya
We outside now
Ah ya ya
Feet on the ground
Mind clear
Heart bold
From the void
Past the gold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold
